sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109350" key="u(pote/tartos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτέταρτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109350.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contained</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times,</tr_> i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">standing to another number in the ratio</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl>:<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.Cap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.761</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
